positive: A stylized, graphic illustration of a mythical forest creature, resembling a gentle griffin or phoenix, perched majestically on a crystalline rock. The creature should have clean, geometric lines and vibrant, metallic feather detailing in shades of sapphire blue, emerald green, and deep gold. Behind the creature, incorporate stylized floral elements and swirling vines that look like pure energy, suggesting growth and magic. The background should be a muted, complementary wash of violet and lavender, keeping the focus intensely on the central creature and its dramatic silhouette. Style: Neo-tribal, modern vector art, high-contrast silhouette, flat graphic design, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the edges of the creature. Composition: Central, highly detailed, and balanced, with ample negative space around the primary subject.
